metadata.description: (state) → Promise<Uint8Array>. Pack every loaded segment outside the kernel closure into a role-foldered .zip (applications/ libraries/ user/). The bundled kernel is excluded; its deps resolve on import.
(state, name) → Promise<Uint8Array>. Pack an application segment + its transitive library deps (self-contained, runnable), kernel excluded.
(state, name) → Promise<Uint8Array>. Pack a library segment + its transitive library deps (self-contained), kernel excluded.
(state, name) → Promise<Uint8Array>. Pack a user-space + its private (role:user-space) deps only; shared libraries and the application are referenced, not packed (expected present on import).

(state, bytes: Uint8Array, opts?: { onlyRoles?: Role[] }) → Promise<State>. Unzip a .甲 archive and hydrate its segments, skipping the kernel closure. opts.onlyRoles restricts to specific roles (tiered import — e.g. just user-spaces from a full workspace).
